label: GDD emergence
Description: Growing degree days required for emergence phase threshold.

label: GDD vegetative
Description: Growing degree days required until end of vegetative phase.

label: GDD bulbing
Description: Growing degree days required until end of bulbing.

label: GDD maturation
Description: CUMULATIVE Growing degree days required until crop maturity.

label: Sowing day (yday)
Description: Day of year when onions are sown (DOY 45 = mid-Feb, DOY 135 = mid-May).

label: LUE emergence (g/MJ)
Description: Light use efficiency during emergence phase.

label: LUE vegetative (g/MJ)
Description: Light use efficiency during vegetative phase.

label: LUE bulbing (g/MJ)
Description: Light use efficiency during bulbing phase.

label: LUE maturation (g/MJ)
Description: Light use efficiency during maturation phase.

label: Harvest Index
Description: Fraction of biomass partitioned to the bulb.

label: k parameter
Description: Light extinction coefficient k for Beer-Lambert radiation model.

label: Dry matter content
Description: Dry matter content to calculate fresh yield.

label: Temp minimum growth
Description: Minimum temperature for onion growth (Beta curve).

label: Temp optimum growth
Description: Optimum temperature for onion growth (Beta curve).

label: Temp maximum growth
Description: Maximum temperature for onion growth (Beta curve).

label: Water lower optimal
Description: Lower bound of water response function.

label: nFK (mm/cm)
Description: Plant-available field capacity per cm root depth. Geisenheimer Tab.1: schluffiger Lehm (uL) = 22 Vol pct = 2.2 mm/cm.

label: Max irrigation (mm)
Description: Maximum irrigation dose per event.

label: Root depth EM (cm)
Description: Geisenheimer: 0-30 cm for Stadium 1.

label: Root depth VG (cm)
Description: Geisenheimer: 0-30 cm for Stadium 2.

label: Root depth BL (cm)
Description: Geisenheimer: 0-60 cm for Stadium 3.

label: Root depth MT (cm)
Description: Geisenheimer: 0-60 cm for Stadium 4.

label: Kc EM
Description: Geisenheimer kc Stadium 1: ab Auflaufen (BBCH 09). Ref: Zinkernagel et al. 2022.

label: Kc VG
Description: Geisenheimer kc Stadium 2: ab 5. Blatt (BBCH 15). Ref: Zinkernagel et al. 2022.

label: Kc BL
Description: Geisenheimer kc Stadium 3: ab 8. Blatt (BBCH 18). Ref: Zinkernagel et al. 2022.

label: Kc MT
Description: Geisenheimer kc Stadium 4: ab Schlottenknicken (BBCH 47). kc=0 per Geisenheim. Small range for MC.

label: Moderate rain threshold
Description: Threshold for medium extreme rainfall.

label: High rain threshold
Description: Threshold for high extreme rainfall.

label: Impact duration
Description: Days of impact after extreme rain event.

label: Yield loss fraction
Description: Fractional yield loss if extreme rain occurs.

label: Humidity threshold
Description: RH threshold for downy mildew onset.

label: Tmin mildew
Description: Minimum temperature for mildew growth.

label: Optimal temp mildew
Description: Downy mildew optimal temperature.

label: Tmax mildew
Description: Maximum temperature for mildew growth.

label: Yield loss fraction
Description: Fractional reduction due to downy mildew.

label: Tmin Fusarium
Description: Minimum soil temperature for Fusarium growth.

label: Optimal soil temp
Description: Fusarium optimal soil temperature.

label: Tmax Fusarium
Description: Maximum soil temperature for Fusarium growth.

label: Waterlogging threshold (Fusarium)
Description: Relative soil moisture threshold above which Fusarium risk is scored. Ref: Abawi & Lorbeer (1972)

label: Yield loss fraction
Description: Fractional yield loss from Fusarium.

label: Prec leaf-wetness gate
Description: Daily precipitation threshold (mm). Sharpened from 1-3 to 3-5 mm. Ref: Sutton et al. (1986) BOTCAST.

label: Tmin Botrytis
Description: Minimum temperature for Botrytis growth.

label: Optimal temp Botrytis
Description: Botrytis optimum temperature.

label: Tmax Botrytis
Description: Maximum temperature for Botrytis growth.

label: Yield loss fraction
Description: Fractional yield loss if Botrytis occurs.

label: Chance Hail event 2020 (Baseline)
Description: Chance that hail event might occur in future scenario

label: Yield loss fraction
Description: Fractional yield loss if hail event occurs

label: Chance Hail event 2075
Description: Chance that hail event might occur in 2075

label: Yield loss fraction
Description: Fractional yield loss if hail event occurs

label: LAI emergence
Description: Leaf area index during emergence phase.

label: LAI vegetative
Description: Leaf area index during vegetative phase.

label: LAI bulbing
Description: Leaf area index during bulbing phase.

label: LAI maturation
Description: Leaf area index during maturation phase (declining canopy).

label: Water stress floor
Description: Minimum f(W) at PWP. Non-zero floor prevents complete cessation in MC framework.

label: CO2 sensitivity S_co2 (per ppm)
Description: CO₂ fertilisation sensitivity for C3 crops in SIMPLE model: f(CO₂) = 1 + S_co2 × (CO₂ - CO₂_ref) for CO₂ < 700 ppm, capped at 700 ppm. CO₂_ref = co2_ppm_historical (~415 ppm). Wheat/soybean S_co2 = 0.0008/0.0007 (Zhao et al. 2019 Table 1a). Onion as C3 vegetable: 0.0006-0.0008. Consistent with ~7% yield gain per 100 ppm (Ainsworth & Long 2005).

label: CO2 historical (ppm)
Description: Atmospheric CO2 concentration for 2020 baseline (~415 ppm observed). Small range reflects measurement uncertainty.

label: CO2 SSP1-2.6 2075 (ppm)
Description: Projected CO2 for SSP1-2.6 at 2075. IPCC AR6: ~430-490 ppm (aggressive mitigation).

label: CO2 SSP2-4.5 2075 (ppm)
Description: Projected CO2 for SSP2-4.5 at 2075. IPCC AR6: ~530-620 ppm (intermediate emissions).

label: CO2 SSP3-7.0 2075 (ppm)
Description: Projected CO2 for SSP3-7.0 at 2075. IPCC AR6: ~640-760 ppm (high emissions).

label: CO2 SSP5-8.5 2075 (ppm)
Description: Projected CO2 for SSP5-8.5 at 2075. IPCC AR6: ~750-900 ppm (very high emissions).
